description_long: This is an open hardcover book with a red spine and beige pages, suspended in mid-air with several pages appearing to flutter or fly away from the book. The book's pages are slightly fanned out, giving a sense of motion and lightness. The cover is plain with no visible illustration or text, and the edges of the pages are slightly uneven, suggesting a well-used or vintage appearance. The flying pages are semi-transparent and scattered above the book, adding a whimsical, magical effect. The book's binding is visible at the center, and the overall form is compact and rectangular. No publisher logo, dust jacket, or decorative elements are visible on the cover or spine.
description: An open hardcover book with beige pages and a red spine, with pages flying out above it in a whimsical, magical effect.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open book with fanned pages and several pages flying upward, red spine visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the book and the direction of the flying pages, with the book's cover and page edges visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the open book from the back, with the binding and flying pages most prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the book's thickness and the scattering of pages.
